title: End of Evangelion Last A and Last B
display_title: End of Evangelion Last A and Last B
wikitext:
[]: End of Evangelion Last A and Last B Post by Strayn » Wed May 11, 2011 9:21 am Are there videos of the alternate Last A and Last B endings for EoE? or are they just scenarios that never got animated?

[]: Post by Xard » Wed May 11, 2011 9:24 am They never went past storyboard stage IIRC. Certainly they were never animated

[]: Post by Strayn » Wed May 11, 2011 9:26 am A shame. Well, that ends that. Lock please.

[]: Post by juaxoo » Tue May 17, 2011 4:04 pm Anno: "Alright, people, we gotta finish EoE today, give me some ideas" Crew: "Sir, we are still trying to figure out an ending for it, you've really made it hard for us to come up with an ending to something mind-fuck like that!" Anno: "Fuck you all! I am god, and if other gods don't like it they know where to find me. Crew: "err..uhm...uh, well we have come up with two endings here, please check this out" *Hands Last A and Last B script to Anno* Anno: *ignores the two endings* "Actually, I've just come up with the perfect ending: Have Shinji reject Rei's hot incest sex, and then spawn on a beach, and with a wounded Asuka with dressings similar to Rei's beside him, the camera pans to Rei's head and body and blood everywhere, then we have Shinji choking Asuka, a dying Asuka puts her hand on Shinji's face, he then stops and cries. With Shinji's tear dropped on Asuka's cheek, says 'I feel disgusted' and then the credits roll." Crew: "......why?" Anno: "because I said so" Crew: "...o-ok" I am very sorry in advance

[]: Post by juaxoo » Tue May 17, 2011 4:04 pm Anno: "Alright, people, we gotta finish EoE today, give me some ideas" Crew: "Sir, we are still trying to figure out an ending for it, you've really made it hard for us to come up with an ending to something mind-fuck like that!" Anno: "Fuck you all! I am god, and if other gods don't like it they know where to find me. Crew: "err..uhm...uh, well we have come up with two endings here, please check this out" *Hands Last A and Last B script to Anno* Anno: *ignores the two endings* "Actually, I've just come up with the perfect ending: Have Shinji reject Rei's hot incest sex, and then spawn on a beach, and with a wounded Asuka with dressings similar to Rei's beside him, the camera pans to Rei's head and body and blood everywhere, then we have Shinji choking Asuka, a dying Asuka puts her hand on Shinji's face, he then stops and cries. With Shinji's tear dropped on Asuka's cheek, says 'I feel disgusted' and then the credits roll." Crew: "......why?" Anno: "because I said so" Crew: "...o-ok" I am very sorry in advance
